name: jet-lag-app-prototype
description: Round-based backend prototype for a Jet Lag style hide-and-seek game

scripts.dev:android: concurrently -n api,mobile -c yellow,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm --prefix mobile run android:local"
scripts.dev:android:clean: concurrently -n api,mobile -c yellow,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm --prefix mobile run android:local:clear"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,client -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,client,mobile -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:mobile"
